data.body: Patchset 2 CI failed on the env-var registry drift gate (test_gen_env_registry): my 9-line docstring in inbound_translate.py shifted an os.environ.get() call-site from line 40->49, and docs/env-vars.md pins call-site line numbers. Root cause of missing it: I ran make lint+typecheck but not the full make test locally. Fix: regenerated docs/env-vars.md (the intended workflow). Patchset 3 pushed (5 files). This time ran FULL make test: 4935 passed, 21 skipped. Awaiting re-vote.
